mapper.select: /* InsrMgmtMapper.getIntmInsrProdList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS insrProdCd , A.RATE_NM AS insrProdNm , A.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt , B.ETC1 AS insrTypeCd FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND #{trtmDt} BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT ORDER BY B.ETC6

/* InsrMgmtMapper.getPrdtListByPrdtNm */ SELECT C.INSR_PROD_CD AS insrProdCd , D.RATE_NM AS insrProdNm , B.MNFCT_NM AS mnfctNm , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId , A.PRDT_CODE AS prdtCode , A.PRDT_NM AS prdtNm FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , ORG_MNFCT_MST B , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST C , MSP_RATE_MST D WHERE A.RPRS_YN ='Y' AND A.MNFCT_ID = B.MNFCT_ID AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{prdtNm}) ||'%' AND C.INSR_PROD_CD = #{insrProdCd} AND C.INSR_PROD_CD = D.RATE_CD AND #{trtmDt} BETWEEN D.APPL_STRT_DT AND D.APPL_END_DT ORDER BY A.MNFCT_ID, A.PRDT_CODE, A.PRDT_NM

/* InsrMgmtMapper.getChgInsrCombo */
SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USG_YN = #{usgYn} AND A.INSR_TYPE_CD = '02' ORDER BY ETC6
SELECT VALUE , TEXT FROM ( SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text , B.ETC6 FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USG_YN = #{usgYn} AND A.INSR_PROD_CD IN ( SELECT INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_REL WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND APPL_YN = 'Y' ) UNION SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text , B.ETC6 FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USG_YN = #{usgYn} AND A.INSR_TYPE_CD = '02' ) ORDER BY ETC6
SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USG_YN = #{usgYn} ORDER BY ETC6
SELECT A.INSR_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.INSR_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0247' AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USG_YN = #{usgYn} ORDER BY ETC6
